// reporters: Tier2ReporterDecl.java.txt#InternalLog.logInternal
package com.other;

import static com.consumer.x.InternalLog.logInternal;

// Explicit static import: the unqualified logInternal(e) resolves source-only to
// (com.consumer.x, InternalLog) through the static import, matching the
// declaration - a capture, no finding.
class Tier2StaticImport {
    void staticImportIsCapture() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            logInternal("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
